About Me

Geography meets Technology

I am a GIS Analyst and Geography Student with practical experience in geospatial analysis, remote sensing, urban growth monitoring, flood risk assessment, spatial suitability modeling, dashboard development, and Web GIS applications.

My goal is to transform satellite imagery and geospatial data into meaningful insights that support planning and decision-making processes.

Featured Work

GIS Projects

ArcGIS Pro Google Earth Engine Landsat NDBI

Urban Growth Monitoring in Madrid, Spain (2013–2025)

This project investigates urban growth patterns in Madrid, Spain between 2013 and 2025 using Landsat imagery and the Normalized Difference Built-up Index (NDBI). The study evaluates spatial urban expansion and identifies development hotspots using multi-temporal change detection techniques.

Outputs

  • Urban expansion mapped successfully
  • Growth hotspots identified
  • Built-up area changes quantified
ArcGIS Pro DEM Sentinel-1 NDWI

Flood Risk Assessment

Flood hazard assessment using DEM, Sentinel-1 imagery, NDWI, and hydrological modeling techniques to identify flood-prone areas and support disaster risk reduction planning.

Outputs

  • Flood Risk Map
  • Hazard Classification
  • Vulnerability Assessment
ArcGIS Pro Landsat 9 Change Detection

Urban Expansion Analysis in Cairo, Egypt

A spatial analysis project designed to monitor urban growth and land cover transformation in Cairo using satellite imagery and GIS techniques.

Outputs

  • Urban Expansion Maps
  • Land Cover Change Analysis
  • Urban Growth Statistics
ArcGIS Online ArcGIS Dashboards Web GIS

Interactive GIS Dashboards

Development of interactive GIS dashboards to visualize spatial analysis results, support decision-making, and present GIS outputs through dynamic maps and charts.

Outputs

  • Interactive Dashboards
  • Dynamic Charts
  • Web Mapping Applications
ArcGIS Pro Cartography Historical GIS

Vietnam War — Spatial Analysis & Historical Mapping

A cartographic and spatial visualization project focusing on the Vietnam War, presenting historical military operations, strategic locations, conflict zones, and geographic patterns through professional GIS mapping techniques.

Skills Demonstrated

  • Cartographic Design & Map Layout
  • Historical GIS & Spatial Storytelling
  • Military Operations Mapping
  • Professional Cartographic Layout
